description: All-vehicle fleet by primary fuel with avg CO2 and km/liter. Use when user asks fuel mix across all vehicles, or fuel-level emissions/efficiency. Passenger-car only: dmr-car-fuel-age-summary.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND _drivkraft_primaer IS NOT NULL | STATS vehicle_count = COUNT(*), avg_co2_g_per_km = AVG(_co2_g_per_km_primaer), avg_km_per_liter = AVG(_km_per_liter_primaer) BY primary_fuel = _drivkraft_primaer | SORT vehicle_count DESC | LIMIT 20
